scripts.clean: knip --fix --allow-remove-files --no-exit-code && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['apps/api/dist', 'apps/api/node_modules', 'apps/web/.next', 'apps/web/node_modules', '.turbo', 'node_modules', 'pnpm-lock.yaml', 'bun.lock'].forEach(d => fs.rmSync(d, { recursive: true, force: true }))"
scripts.db:generate: cd apps/api && bun run --env-file=../../.env drizzle-kit generate
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && bun run --env-file=../../.env drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.db:push: cd apps/api && bun run --env-file=../../.env drizzle-kit push
scripts.db:studio: cd apps/api && bun run --env-file=../../.env drizzle-kit studio
